query:
SELECT name, COUNT(*) as total, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(position ORDER BY id) as positions
FROM players
GROUP BY name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY name;
command:
